acceptance_criteria.text: All 10 user-request scenarios are classified into a plausible LocalOS agent category or custom integration workflow.
proof: Manual builder-state pass inspected all 10 prompts.

acceptance_criteria.text: The builder must not ask cross-domain questions for non-outreach scenarios.
proof: Scenario test checks forbidden lead/prospectingleads question terms.

acceptance_criteria.text: Scheduled Telegram scenarios use Telegram delivery connection flow.
proof: Daily reminder and reviews-to-Telegram scenarios return telegram_destination connection resolver.

acceptance_criteria.text: Google Sheets and finance scenarios preserve required source questions.
proof: Google Sheets -> Telegram and finance import scenarios keep google_sheets_target when no sheet is provided.

acceptance_criteria.text: Regression tests and frontend build pass.
proof: venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py -q passed with 160 tests.

known_gaps: Google Sheets scenarios still need concrete sheet/table details from the user when not provided.
